name: Documentation Browser
description: Full documentation reading experience with navigable doc tree, content pane, and table of contents. Core interface for knowledge base platforms.

page_briefs.docs: Three-column documentation hub. Left column displays a hierarchical page tree for navigating the doc structure. Center column shows the currently selected document content. Right column renders a sticky table of contents generated from document headings. Breadcrumb navigation spans the top of the center column for orientation within nested sections.
page_briefs.doc-page: Individual documentation page rendered in long-form prose format. Left sidebar retains the page tree for context. Center column displays the full document with heading anchors, inline code blocks, and callout boxes. A minimal command palette is available via keyboard shortcut for quick navigation to other pages. Right column shows the on-page TOC.

shells.three-column-browser: Doc tree sidebar, content pane, and TOC sidebar for three-column documentation browsing
